name: lazyobserver-monorepo
description: lazyobserver — local-first observability, memory and reporting for Claude Code work

scripts.build: npm run build -w @lazyobserver/core && npm run build -w @lazyobserver/daemon && npm run build -w @lazyobserver/mcp && npm run build -w lazyobserver && npm run build -w @lazyobserver/web
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @lazyobserver/core && npm run typecheck -w @lazyobserver/daemon && npm run typecheck -w @lazyobserver/mcp && npm run typecheck -w lazyobserver
